$description: Semantic spacing roles: purpose-named gaps and insets that bind the raw scale to intent. Theme-independent. Recipes and components reference these role names, so rhythm can be tuned system-wide from one place.

gap.$description: Spacing between sibling elements in a stack or cluster.

inset.$description: Internal padding for surfaces (cards, panels, controls).

section.$description: Vertical rhythm between and within page sections. Fluid: each role scales between min (mobile) and max (desktop) via clamp().
